title: ixora koordersii
intro: Ixora koordersii, also known as the yellow ixora or jungle geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Southeast Asia, due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ixora koordersii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
